mano_cua.result_summary: 设置弹窗功能正常：Help菜单找到Settings入口，弹窗完整渲染主题/语言/通知/导航树等所有设置项。Theme下拉切换Midnight成功，Language切换中文成功，通知开关可切换，通知位置下拉可操作，ESC关闭弹窗后界面恢复正常。弹窗打开/渲染/交互/关闭均无异常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The Settings dialog was closed successfully using the Escape key. The dialog closed properly and we're back to the main Vuefinder interface. The file manager now shows the Midnight dark theme and menus are in Chinese - Language change was applied. Interface recovered to normal state.
